creator: need4spam@bk.ru
text:
Also i have similar problem when i detach(button on my laptop) my Bluetooth&Wifi cards (same issue when i attach my flash) card:

(kgdb) list *0xc093e161
0xc093e161 is in strcmp (/usr/src/sys/libkern/strcmp.c:45).
40	 */
41	int
42	strcmp(s1, s2)
43		register const char *s1, *s2;
44	{
45		while (*s1 == *s2++)
46			if (*s1++ == 0)
47				return (0);
48		return (*(const unsigned char *)s1 - *(const unsigned char *)(s2 - 1));
49	}
(kgdb) 

Attach/detach under Linux works fine, so i think it's not a hardware problem, also i've tested my RAM with memtest,,, it work fine.

crashinfo attached
